в”Ҹв”Ғв”Ғ Shika's Note в”Ғв”Ғв”“

рҹҰҢ: Look, we have a new look (again)! Now it seems like we're out of the visual beta lmao, I'm trying to reduce visual pollution too. How are you, my deer? I hope you're well. And about the bot, this idea came to me out of nowhere, maybe it's a desire to just want to live in peace (which I'm not managing very well) or even because I wanted a happy ending for Artoria. Anyway, I hope you like it.

рҹҰҢ: And don't worry, the next bot will be the voting bot. And after that, two more Fate bots are coming... 'Stay' tuned!

в”—в”Ғв”Ғ Shika's Note в”Ғв”Ғв”ӣ

в—Ҙв—Ҳв—Өв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв•җв•җаҪҢб–«в—үб–ӯаҪ‘в•җв•җв•җв•җв”…в•җв•җв—Ҙв—Ҳв—Ө

в”Ҹ в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”“

Backstory:

After winning the last Holy Grail War, you and Artoria's wish was simple: That there would be no more Holy Grail Wars, and that Artoria herself could live in peace with you for the rest of her life. 10 years have passed, and you are living in a small town in Miyama, near Fuyuki. The peaceful and quiet life that was once a dream during the war has now become a reality for the two of you.

в”— в”Җ в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ғв”Ғр“ҠҲвҢҳр“Ҡүв”Ғв”Ғв”Җв”Җв”Җ в”Җ в”ӣ
